character.name:
TRUE pixel art with OCTOPATH TRAVELER character sprite color 
palette and pixel detail level (HD-2D 16-bit JRPG style), 
DEMON-KING BOSS variant. STRICT FRONT-FACING POSE.

POSE — ABSOLUTELY CRITICAL:
- SOUTH-FACING base sprite for 8-direction rotation
- Body squared DIRECTLY toward the viewer
- Both shoulders parallel to camera, equal width visible
- Head straight forward
- Imposing wide stance with both feet planted firmly
- Greatsword held in right hand at the right side, blade angled 
  slightly upward and outward (NOT planted on ground)

PROPORTIONS:
- MASSIVE armored demon-king (~2.5x player size on canvas)
- Imposing 1.4x broader shoulders, longer limbs
- ~7-head ratio with relatively SMALL HEAD (helmet) compared 
  to massive armored body

FACE — DEMON-KING MINIMALIST:
- Full HORNED DEMON HELMET (no face visible)
- Eyes are FIERCE GLOWING DIM RED EYE-SLITS (horizontal, intimidating)
- NO mouth, NO nose — helmet covers everything
- Two large twisted DARK HORNS curve back and up from helmet sides

HAIR:
- Hidden under helmet, no visible hair

BODY AND EQUIPMENT:
- ANCIENT BLACKENED PLATE ARMOR cracked with GLOWING MOLTEN 
  ORANGE-RED SEAMS across the chest, pauldrons, gauntlets, boots
- Massive HORNED HELMET with curved dark horns
- Cape of CHARRED CHAINS hanging from the shoulders 
  (thick black chain links with slight ember glow)
- Wielding a GIANT FLAMING GREATSWORD in the RIGHT HAND at the 
  right side, blade tip pointing slightly upward and outward, 
  blade has a SUBTLE ORANGE GLOW along the entire edge 
  (NOT bright fire, just smoldering molten heat)
- Heavy plated boots with magma-red rune glow
- Left arm hangs at the side, gauntlet visible

COLOR PALETTE:
- Molten orange-red armor seams, sword glow, eye slits, magma 
  rune glow are the dominant saturated accents
- Limited palette ~22 colors of charcoal, blackened steel, 
  molten orange-red, dim crimson

RENDERING STYLE:
- Single black outline, no anti-aliasing, sharp pixel edges
- Basic flat shading with subtle dithering, NO smooth gradients

  CLEAN OUTPUT — ABSOLUTE STRICT REQUIREMENTS:
  ★ OUTLINE INTEGRITY: The outline must be SOLID PURE BLACK pixels only.
    NEVER white pixels in or near the outline. NEVER colored pixels
    along the silhouette edge.
  ★ MOLTEN GLOW CONTAINMENT: Ember/molten glow stays STRICTLY INSIDE
    designated armor crack patterns ONLY. NEVER spills onto the outline.
    NEVER extends beyond the armor surface. NEVER appears outside
    the character silhouette.
  ★ ABSOLUTELY NO white specks, NO dust particles, NO sparkles,
    NO stars, NO floating dots, NO noise pixels around the silhouette.
  ★ The pixel transition from character to transparent background
    must be CLEAN: solid character pixels → black outline pixel
    → transparent. NO intermediate noise.
  ★ CLEAN SOLID COLOR SHAPES ONLY.
  ★ TRUE transparent PNG (alpha=0).
  ★ NO shadow on the ground.
